I have noticed a number of times that when I push the stalk on the Fisker, which is supposed to move it from Drive to Park, that it has gone from Drive to Neutral. I have caught this happening probably 6 or so times in the 150 drives I have taken in the last two months. The solut

narrative.headline: What 2023 Fisker Ocean owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system faults are the most-reported pattern, with owners describing vehicles that become undrivable due to cascading errors and unavailable functions. Brake-related complaints are nearly as common, centered on a confirmed issue where braking over bumps produces an unsafe response. Advanced driver-assistance systems — forward collision avoidance and lane departure — are also widely reported, with owners describing unintended lurching acceleration and false warning messages tied to road conditions and sun angle.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report vehicles exhibiting numerous simultaneous errors and suddenly unavailable functions, rendering the car undrivable and raising broad safety concerns. · 2 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners and Fisker have confirmed an issue where braking over road bumps produces an unsafe response, with at least one owner calling for a stop-sale until a fix is applied. · 1 fire · 9 crash · 4 injured

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: Owners report the brakes disengaging and the car lurching forward while actively braking or using regenerative braking on hills or uneven pavement. · 1 fire · 6 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Lane Departure
issues.blurb: Owners report persistent warning messages for the Auto Emergency Braking and Lane Keep systems when driving at particular angles relative to the sun, suggesting the systems may be non-functional in those conditions.
